THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, GERDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL, VANESSA LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1278 MARKET ST., #206, S.F., CA., LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY JULY 31, 29004, PLAINTIFF WILL PROVIDE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AND DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO RELINQUISH POSSESSION BY JULY 31, 2004, PLAINITFF CAN MOVE EX PARTE WITHOUT NOTICE FOR A JUDGMENT OF POSSESSION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
